rebrands.context: Announced at Cloud Next 2026 keynote. The PMLE v3.1 exam guide and Skills Boost courseware still use the 2025 name 'Vertex AI Agent Builder'. Function-first translate when answer choices use either name.
Was already a re-rebrand from 'Vertex AI Agent Builder' (Apr 2025). Now renamed again at Next 2026.
Renamed at Next 2026. Endpoints and IDs unchanged; only the surface brand changed.
Renamed at Next 2026. Pipelines, Training, Model Registry, ML Metadata, Experiments names are intact.
Domain cloudskillsboost.google → skills.google (308 redirects). Path /paths/17 unchanged.
Was 'LangChain on Vertex AI' before that. Managed runtime for deployed agents.
Renamed via 'Reasoning Engine' to current name.
Late-2024 rename. Includes related Conversational Messenger / Conversational Phone Gateway sub-renames.
ScaNN-based ANN store on Vertex AI. PMLE v3.1 will only see the new name; pre-2024 guides still say 'Matching Engine'.
Pre-2024 study material may still use 'AI Platform' — treat as outdated.
Subsequently rebranded twice — current name (Apr 2026) is 'Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform'.
